name: golang-github-prometheus-procfs-dev
title: golang-github-prometheus-procfs-dev
summary: Golang library to retrieve metrics from the proc pseudo-filesystem
description:
Golang library to retrieve metrics from the proc pseudo-filesystem
Procfs provides functions to retrieve system, kernel and process metrics from
the proc pseudo-filesystem.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-prometheus-procfs-dev because Golang library to retrieve metrics from the proc pseudo-filesystem.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-prometheus-procfs-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-prometheus-procfs-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-prometheus-procfs-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
